question: This line chart displays average satisfaction scores (1–10) by department. Which of the following statements is most accurate based on the data shown?

options.A: There is a repeating up-and-down pattern every two departments along the x-axis.
options.B: HR has the highest satisfaction score among all departments.
options.C: Finance has the highest satisfaction score among all departments shown.
options.D: The scores steadily increase from the first department on the left to the last department on the right.

explanation: This line chart uses a continuous line over department that are purely categorical (e.g., HR, Engineering, Operations, ...). Connecting points suggests there is a meaningful smooth progression from left to right, which is conceptually incorrect — these categories have no inherent numeric order. The y‑axis values are on a 1 to 10 scale, but any comparison across categories should be made with a discrete chart such as a bar chart, not by reading trends from the connecting line.
